featureCards.title: Learn
featureCards.desc: Build AI red teaming skills through core concepts, skill checks, and hands-on exercises.

featureCards.title: Advance
featureCards.desc: Progress to real-world scenarios and deeper technical material after a background check and interview.

featureCards.title: Get Hired
featureCards.desc: Strong performance leads to hiring opportunities for AI red team roles, paying $25–$100 per hour.
